name: MAC-10 | 玩具盒子
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. This custom paint job features brightly-colored drawings of chickens, aliens, defusers and more. Clean up your mess
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器以色彩鲜艳的小鸡、外星人和拆弹者等图画进行了自定义涂装。 清理好你的烂摊子
